tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: By the time the rescue team arrives, the hikers _________ in the mountains for over 48 hours.
If she had taken the earlier train, she _________ stuck in the traffic jam.
Dad: Why are you so tired? Son: I _________ all night for the chemistry test.
She suddenly realised that she _________ her wallet at the restaurant.
If I _________ more time when I was younger, I would speak Japanese fluently now.
Next September, my parents _________ married for twenty-five years.
